profile.name: Muhammad Mahatir
profile.bio: I’m a software engineer who loves turning complex problems into simple, digital tools. My journey started back in 2016 building desktop apps for accounting and city government reports, but my path eventually led me to the web. During my time at Ejen2u, I fell in love with the SaaS multi-tenant world—an expertise I’ve since poured into my own projects like Wishwash and Edeskel. Whether it's helping villages go digital or streamlining hospital management, I’m most at home when I’m bridging the gap between technical logic and real-world impact, building everything from robust databases to smooth interfaces with Laravel and Vue.

desc: Leverage Model-View-Controller (MVC) architecture to design and implement end-to-end features for SaaS applications.
Apply advanced problem-solving skills to identify system bottlenecks and deliver efficient technical solutions.
Collaborate across the full technology stack to improve user interface responsiveness and backend stability.
Developed and maintained robust server-side logic using PHP and the Laravel framework.
Ensured code reliability and software quality through automated testing using PHPUnit.
Developed web-based application products for internal operation company use.
Maintained and optimized existing systems to improve performance and user experience.
Develop a Web-Based Information System for Regional Public Service Agency Hospital on Kab. Konawe.
Develop Desktop Based Report Management Application for Sections Organisasi dan Tata Laksana Makassar city government.
Develop a Web-Based 'Smart Desa' Information System for Desa Buhung Bundang Kec. Bontotiro Kab. Bulukumba
Develop a Web-Based 'Smart Desa' Information System for Desa Lebang Manai, Kec. Rumbia Kab. Jeneponto
Develop a Web-Based Computer Test Assist Application for 'UPT Penilaian Potensi dan Komptensi' BKD Sulsel
Develop Desktop-Based Accounting Information Systems for PT. Adiatma Group

projects.title: Wishwash.id
projects.desc: SaaS multi-tenant POS for laundry services with efficient database management.

projects.title: Edeskel.id
projects.desc: Administrative correspondence management application for villages.

projects.title: SIMRS BLUD Konawe
projects.desc: Administrative correspondence management application for villages.

projects.title: Report Management Application
projects.desc: Report management application is a project from the organization and governance section of the Makassar city government. This application is used to facilitate the creation of several reports such as workload analysis reports, job analysis reports, job evaluation reports, job standard reports, competency standard reports, and making ID cards for all employees within the scope of the Makassar city government.

projects.title: Smart Desa Buhung Bundang
projects.desc: Smart Desa Buhung Bundang is a project from PT Global Connection Indonesia to digitize data from the village government of Buhung Bundang, Bontotiro District, Bulukumba Regency. With features such as village population data, village activity reports, correspondence, etc. This project is a web-based application developed using CodeIgniter framework.

projects.title: Smart Desa Lebang Manai
projects.desc: Smart Desa Lebang Manai is a project from PT Global Connection Indonesia to digitize data from the village government of Lebang Manai, Rumbia District, Jeneponto Regency. With features such as village population data, village activity reports, correspondence, etc. This project is a web-based application developed using CodeIgniter framework.

projects.title: Computer Assisted Test
projects.desc: Computer Assisted Test is a project from PT Global Connection Indonesia for UPT. assessment, potential and competence of the regional civil service agency of South Sulawesi. This application used to perform official exams and diploma adjustments, transfer examinations, outsourcing selection examinations, etc. This project is a web-based application developed using CodeIgniter framework.

projects.title: Accounting Information System
projects.desc: Accounting Information System is a project of PT Global Connection Indonesia for PT Alhikmah Trans. This application was developed to make recording financial reports faster and more efficient.
